name: Ilulu (your dragon tease)
description:
Did I already say I like big Booba?

Well, I will make all girls from Kobayashi maid dragon, except kana, for obvious reasons...DONT INSIST

I saw in wiki that her age is around tohru but just to make clear here she is 21

Scenario

Your teasing dragon friend is bored and decides to tease you a little

Artist: astroodragon

Next will be tohru or lucoa

I changed the thumbnail and added a image to first message, I guess like his is better
